branchContext: The v1-2 goal branch is an ancestor of the current v1-3 ASO/submission branch.

blockers.label: Final readiness report marks 9.2 reached
requiredEvidence: docs/FINAL_9_2_READINESS_REPORT.md may only switch to 9.2 reached: Yes after all external/manual proof blockers are closed.
blockers.nextAction: Leave the report at No until products-loaded paywall, StoreKit sandbox/restore, and VoiceOver traversal proof exist; then update and re-run the gate.

blockers.label: Completion audit no longer marks goal incomplete

requiredEvidence: docs/COMPLETION_AUDIT_9_2.md may only remove the Not complete verdict after all external/manual proof blockers are closed.

blockers.label: Products-loaded paywall proof exists
blockers.detail: Missing products-loaded StoreKit paywall screenshot. Use docs/STOREKIT_TESTING_RUNBOOK.md; tooling/setup attempts are recorded in storekit-sandbox-attempt.md.

blockers.label: StoreKit sandbox purchase/restore proof exists
blockers.detail: StoreKit monthly/yearly/Lifetime purchase and restore proof must be recorded before the 9.2 goal can be closed. Use docs/STOREKIT_TESTING_RUNBOOK.md; setup attempts are recorded in storekit-sandbox-attempt.md. Missing: artifacts/post-goal-aso-submission/external-proof/storekit-sandbox-proof.md.
requiredEvidence: Confirmation that the run used StoreKit Testing or App Store sandbox, not mocked entitlement state.
blockers.nextAction: Run the StoreKit Testing or sandbox flow from docs/STOREKIT_TESTING_RUNBOOK.md, record product IDs and restore output, then re-run npm run verify:goal92.

blockers.label: Full VoiceOver traversal proof exists
blockers.detail: Source-level VoiceOver coverage is not a substitute for simulator/device traversal proof. Use docs/VOICEOVER_TRAVERSAL_RUNBOOK.md; tooling attempts are recorded in voiceover-traversal-attempt.md. Missing: artifacts/post-goal-aso-submission/external-proof/voiceover-traversal.md.
requiredEvidence: Traversal notes for Check New Work
